recommendations.title: God Bless America
recommendations.overview: Fed up with the cruelty and stupidity of American culture, an unlikely duo goes on a killing spree, killing reality TV stars, bigots and others they find repugnant.

recommendations.title: Nightmare
recommendations.overview: A drug-treated schizophrenic plagued by horrible nightmares is released from the hospital and goes on a killing spree.

recommendations.title: The Mimic
recommendations.overview: The mother of a missing child takes in a lost girl she finds in the woods, but soon begins to wonder if she is even human.

recommendations.title: Old People
recommendations.overview: A woman who's returned home with her two kids to attend her sister's wedding must suddenly defend their lives against older people on a killing spree.

recommendations.title: The Employment
recommendations.overview: A man prepares and goes to work in a bizarre world, where the meaning of human workforce is taken to another level.

recommendations.title: Stopmotion
recommendations.overview: Ella Blake, a stop-motion animator struggling to control her demons after the loss of her overbearing mother, embarks upon the creation of a film that becomes the battleground for her sanity. As Ella’s mind starts to fracture, the characters in her p

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.

recommendations.title: Island of Death
recommendations.overview: A British couple on a break on a small Greek Island spreads terror beyond anything the Islanders could ever have imagined, only stopping every once in a while to shag anything that moves, be it man, woman or animal. But will they go unpunished, or wi

recommendations.title: The Boy
recommendations.overview: An intimate portrait of a 9 year old sociopath as he discovers his taste for killing.

recommendations.title: Sleepless
recommendations.overview: An elderly and retired police detective and a young amateur sleuth team up to find a serial killer whom has resumed a killing spree in Turin, Italy after a 17-year hiatus.
